seo.title: 3-Day Merzouga Desert Tour from Marrakech
seo.metaDescription: Book a 3-day Sahara desert tour from Marrakech to Merzouga with camel trek, Erg Chebbi camp, Ait Ben Haddou, Dades Valley, and Todra Gorge.
seo.lead: A focused 3-day Sahara desert tour from Marrakech with High Atlas scenery, kasbah stops, Erg Chebbi camel trekking, and an overnight Merzouga desert camp.

price.label: From EUR 295 per person
price.note: Price is based on standard accommodation and shared transport. Private departures, luxury camps, and peak dates are quoted on request.

seo.imageAlt: Camel trek at sunset on the Erg Chebbi dunes during a Merzouga desert tour from Marrakech
highlights: Cross the High Atlas Mountains via Tizi n'Tichka Pass
Visit Ait Ben Haddou, Ouarzazate, Dades Valley, and Todra Gorge
Ride camels into the Erg Chebbi dunes at sunset
Sleep in a Sahara desert camp with dinner and Berber music

faqs.question: Is this 3-day Sahara desert tour from Marrakech private?
faqs.answer: The route can be arranged as a private tour or a small-group departure depending on your dates, group size, and preferred comfort level.

faqs.question: How far is Merzouga from Marrakech?
faqs.answer: Merzouga is a long desert route from Marrakech, so the itinerary breaks the journey with scenic stops in the High Atlas, Ait Ben Haddou, Dades Valley, and Todra Gorge.

faqs.question: Do I need experience to ride camels in Erg Chebbi?
faqs.answer: No previous experience is needed. Local camel handlers guide the caravan, and the ride is paced for first-time travelers.

faqs.question: What should I pack for the Merzouga desert camp?
faqs.answer: Bring sunglasses, sunscreen, a hat, comfortable shoes, a small overnight bag, and warm layers because Sahara nights can be cold.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade to a luxury desert camp?
faqs.answer: Yes. Standard and luxury desert camp options can be quoted based on availability and your preferred travel dates.

jsonLd.name: 3 Day Merzouga Desert Tour from Marrakech
jsonLd.description: Experience the magic of the Sahara Desert on this 3-day adventure from Marrakech to Merzouga. Explore Ait Ben Haddou, ride camels across golden dunes, camp under starlit skies, and discover the beauty of Morocco's desert wilderness.
